question: Which person was the first civilian superintendent of the Chicago department with the highest average overtime from one year before the year (within 2017-2022) that has the highest total gasoline/gasohol sales across U.S. states through two years after that year? Return the person's name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Filtering fuel_type = "Gasoline/gasohol" and summing value by year (from date) for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 294719877886 in 2019.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the highest total gasoline/gasohol sales across U.S. states? (Filter fuel_type == "Gasoline/gasohol"; derive year from date; sum value by year and select the maximum.)
